nasb.text: But the house of Israel says, ‘The way of the Lord is not right.’ Are My ways not right, O house of Israel? Is it not your ways that are not right?

esv.text: Yet the house of Israel says, ‘The way of the Lord is not just.’ O house of Israel, are my ways not just? Is it not your ways that are not just?

cnv.text: 但以色列家還說：‘主所行的不公平。’以色列家啊，我所行的哪裡不公平呢？豈不是你們所行的不公平嗎？

ccb.text: 以色列人却说，‘主这样做不公平！’以色列人啊，是我的做法不公平呢？还是你们的做法不公平呢？
